items.title: Police find woman in diaper, man covered in baby oil in home where children appeared unbathed
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hegseth says clock paused on deadline to seek approval for Iran war
items.dek: The US defence secretary says the timer for the president to report to Congress "pauses or stops" in a ceasefire.
items.body: The US defence secretary says the timer for the president to report to Congress "pauses or stops" in a ceasefire.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israel releases all but two activists in Greece after intercepting Gaza aid flotilla
items.dek: The Global Sumud Flotilla denounced the interception as "piracy", while Israel's foreign ministry called the flotilla a "PR stunt".
items.body: The Global Sumud Flotilla denounced the interception as "piracy", while Israel's foreign ministry called the flotilla a "PR stunt".
items.author: IriLine Desk
